name: Highwealth Construction Corp.
summary: Highwealth Construction Corp. engages in the construction of commercial buildings in Taiwan. The company operates through four segments: Developing, Constructing, Department Store, and Ecotechnology. The Developing segment develops new constructing or lease opportunities. The Constructing segment is involved in constructing buildings. The Department Store segment manages various shops within the store, supermarkets, and international import and export trade. The Ecotechnology segment provides services for clearing waste. Its apartment buildings include apartments, suites, and parking spaces; and office buildings comprise offices, storefronts, parking lots, and suites. The company is also involved in the construction, lease, and sale of residential and commercial buildings. In addition, it provides real estate broker agent and real estate commerce services; construction material wholesale services; and investment services. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
